label: Trader kind
description: Defines a type of trader (caravan, orbital, visitor, or base trader) and the stock it carries. Referenced by FactionDef trader kind lists.

stockGenerators.label: Stock generators
stockGenerators.description: List of stock generators that define what this trader carries and buys. Each entry uses a Class attribute to select the generator strategy.

orbital.label: Orbital
orbital.description: If true, this trader operates from orbit rather than visiting on foot. Affects generated stock and warm-layer pawn generation.

requestable.label: Requestable
requestable.description: If true, the player can call this trader to visit via comms console.

hideThingsNotWillingToTrade.label: Hide things not willing to trade
hideThingsNotWillingToTrade.description: If true, items the trader is unwilling to trade are hidden in the trade UI rather than shown as unavailable.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for how often this trader kind is chosen when spawning traders. Default 1.

category.label: Category
category.description: Free-form category label grouping related trader kinds. Not displayed to players.

tradeCurrency.label: Trade currency
tradeCurrency.description: Currency accepted by this trader. Silver is the default; Favor is used by Empire traders that accept imperial favor instead of silver.

commonalityMultFromPopulationIntent.label: Commonality mult from population intent
commonalityMultFromPopulationIntent.description: Curve that multiplies this trader's commonality based on the current population intent value. Allows rarer traders to appear more often when colony population is low.

faction.label: Faction
faction.description: FactionDef that this trader kind belongs to. Used for permit-based trading gates and faction-specific trader stock.

permitRequiredForTrading.label: Permit required for trading
permitRequiredForTrading.description: RoyalTitlePermitDef the player must hold before this trader will trade with them. Used for high-tier Empire traders.
